title: Additional step in Approval before email notification to stakeholders
excerpt:

posts.author: siingyii (SY)
posts.cookedHtml:
In the Approval page, we noted that once we added someone’s name in the approval, the stakeholder will be immediately notified.

Are we able to add a “Send” or “Confirm” button before sending the notification in case the wrong receipent is mentioned?

Thank you.
